title: Re-order groups in "group by" view
excerpt: The Group By view is awesome-- giving us great visibility into our work like a pivot table would. It would be even better if the groups created by Group By could be ordered in some logical way, either ascending/descendin…

posts.author: christie.schofield (Christie Schofield)
posts.cookedHtml: The Group By view is awesome-- giving us great visibility into our work like a pivot table would. It would be even better if the groups created by Group By could be ordered in some logical way, either ascending/descending or manual drag/drop. Right now they’re in an unpredictable and inconsistent order and for our complex board, it’s hard to find what you need.
